# ManifestURL.ItemsItem.AssetsItem

**Object**

An array of dictionaries that describe an item to install.

## Declaration

```swift
object ManifestURL.ItemsItem.AssetsItem
```

## Objects

- **ManifestURL.ItemsItem.Metadata**: The metadata for an application or package manifest item.

items.description: The metadata for an application or package manifest item.
items.name: ManifestURL.ItemsItem.Metadata
